frontmatter.title: Wordpress on Thin Air
frontmatter.description: How to squeeze Wordpress/MySql to the bare minimum memory consumption - and survive.

frontmatter.title: Docker Stats with Containers Names
frontmatter.description: There is a way to get container's names out of `docker stats`, and Docker Humble makes it ridicolously easy for you.

frontmatter.title: Dockerized MySQL Crashes a Lot!
frontmatter.description: Have you ever experienced a dockerized MySQL to stuck in low memory VPS? I did and luckily I found a solution! (yes, I googled it)"
